items.name: Africa
facts: The Sahara Desert stretches across part of northern Africa.

items.name: Antarctica
facts: Antarctica is the coldest continent on Earth.
It is covered mostly by thick ice.

items.name: Asia
facts: Asia is the largest continent by area and population.
Mount Everest stands on the border of Nepal and China in Asia.

items.name: Europe
facts: Europe has many countries close together.
Many famous castles and old cities are in Europe.

items.name: North America
facts: North America includes Canada, the United States, and Mexico.
It has mountains, deserts, forests, and coastlines.

items.name: South America
facts: The Amazon Rainforest covers part of South America.
The Andes are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world.

items.name: Australia
facts: It is famous for unique animals like kangaroos and koalas.
